
```{r}
TOURNAMENTS_FILENAME = "../datasets/DATASET-tournaments-TCG-3-six_months.csv"

TOURNAMENTS_DATASET = read.csv(TOURNAMENTS_FILENAME)
TOURNAMENTS_DATASET$X = NULL
```

```{r}
hist(TOURNAMENTS_DATASET$deck_cost, breaks = 30)

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(TOURNAMENTS_DATASET, aes(x=deck_cost))+
  geom_histogram(color="darkblue", fill="lightblue")

```
```{r}
tb = data.frame(table(TOURNAMENTS_DATASET$archetype)) # get frequence of each deck

library(ggplot2)

# Basic piechart
ggplot(tb, aes(x="", y=Freq, fill=Var1)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", width=1, color="white") +
  coord_polar("y", start=0) +
  
  theme_void() # remove background, grid, numeric labels
```

get all winners and do piechart of archetipe
```{r}
winners = TOURNAMENTS_DATASET[TOURNAMENTS_DATASET$placement == "1",]

tb = data.frame(table(winners$archetype)) # get frequence of each deck

library(ggplot2)

# Basic piechart
ggplot(tb, aes(x="", y=Freq, fill=Var1)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", width=1, color="white") +
  coord_polar("y", start=0) +
  
  theme_void() # remove background, grid, numeric labels
```
